verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Yes the world Will bow down and say You are God Every man Will bow down and say You are King

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So let's start right now Why would we wait?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Yes the world Will bow down and say You are God Every man Will bow down and say You are King

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So let's start right now Why would we wait? We can praise You now In victory

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: So we'll sing Hallelujah ‘Til You come again And we'll dance in Your presence ‘Til You come again

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I'll just sing Hallelujah ‘Til You come again And I'll dance in Your presence ‘Til You come again

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: We will sing Hallelujah ‘Til You come again Yes, we'll dance in Your presence ‘Til You come again

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: We will sing Hallelujah ‘Til You come again Yes, we'll dance in Your presence

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place King of glory fill this place King of glory fill this place King of healing fill this place King of my peace fill this place King of my joy fill this place

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: King of power King of glory King of glory King of glory

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: And I'll dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence

verse.name: v19
verse.lines: Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence Dance in Your presence

verse.name: v20
verse.lines: Sing Hallelujah Sing Hallelujah Sing Hallelujah Sing Hallelujah Sing Hallelujah Sing Hallelujah Sing Hallelujah

verse.name: v21
verse.lines: King of glory fill this place Just wanna be with You Just wanna be with You
